items.title: How to prevent your Android phone keyboard from tracking you: 2 options
items.summary: Your Android keyboard may be collecting more than you realize. Here are two ways to take back your privacy, but I only trust one.
items.titleZh: 如何防止你的Android手机键盘跟踪你：2个选项
items.summaryZh: 你的Android键盘收集的信息可能比你意识到的要多。这里有两种方法可以收回你的隐私，但我只相信一种。

items.title: In Praise of a Dumb House
items.summary: Tech has been encroaching on the family domicile for years—but actor, writer, and satirist Jill Kargman is all-in on analog.
items.summaryZh: 多年来，科技一直在蚕食这个家庭的住所，但演员、作家和讽刺作家吉尔·卡格曼（Jill Kargman）都在效仿。

items.title: The Cybercab is the lightest, most efficient Tesla ever made
items.summary: Against all odds, the Tesla Cybercab is in production. And while Elon Musk's company may not have a very coherent plan for the tiny, autonomous two-seater, it's still taking the necessary steps to certify the EV's legitimacy. As such, Tesla recently filed pap…

items.title: Genesis AI thinks the humanoid hype is wrong. Its wheeled robot is the counterargument.
items.summary: On Tuesday, while the robotics industry continued pouring billions into machines that walk like humans, a startup called Genesis AI unveiled one that deliberately does not. Eno is a wheeled robot with a foldable tower, dexterous hands, and a foundation model …
items.titleZh: Genesis AI认为对人形的炒作是错误的。它的轮式机器人是反驳。
items.summaryZh: 周二，当机器人行业继续向像人类一样走路的机器投入数十亿美元时，一家名为Genesis AI的初创公司推出了一款故意不这样做的机器。Eno是一个轮式机器人，有一个可折叠的塔，灵巧的手和一个基础模型…

items.title: The 'Le Chaton Fat' meme techies can't stop talking about
items.summary: A viral fake AI model called "Le Chaton Fat" took on a life of its own after Mistral rebranded its chatbot Le Chat as Vibe.
items.titleZh: “Le Chaton Fat”模因技术人员无法停止谈论
items.summaryZh: 在Mistral将其聊天机器人Le Chat更名为Vibe后，一种名为“Le Chaton Fat”的病毒性假人工智能模型开始了自己的生命。
